search_query: word for someone who writes slogans
combined_text: sloganeer sloganeer [sloh-g uh - neer]Spell Syllables Word Originnoun1. a person who creates and uses slogans frequently.verb (used without object)2. to create or use slogans, especially in an effort to change public opinion. Origin of sloganeer Expand1920-1925First recorded in 1920-25; slogan + -eer Dictiona
